creator: uffe@uffe.org
text:
Hi,

I may have submitted this report under a wrong class (Class: 
maintainer-update).

It is just an ordinary update to the archivers/unadf port.

BUT the port is without maintainer or maintainer wishes to step back - I 
would like to maintain this port.

kind regards Uffe

On 2011-06-21 23:20, FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Thank you very much for your problem report.
> It has the internal identification `ports/158140'.
> The individual assigned to look at your
> report is: freebsd-ports-bugs.
>
> You can access the state of your problem report at any time
> via this link:
